sheets.markdown:
| Parameters |  |  |  |  | Mesocycle |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| Session (7x) | Exercise | Periodization | Sets | Increment (lb) | 1 | 2 | 3 | 4 | 5 | 6 | 7 | 8 |
| A | 1a) Low bar squat | Undulating Rep Range | 4 | 2 | 175 x2, 140x9,8,8 | 164x5,3,3 | 145x8 | 166x5 | 147x8 | 169x5 | 150x8 | 170x5 |
| A | 1b) Sumo press | Undulating Rep Range | 4 | 2 | 65x3,50x11,10,10 | 60x8,6, | 50x12 | 62x8 | 52x12 | 65x6 | 55x11 | 65x7 |
| A | 1c) Chin-ups | Undulating | 2 | 1 | 20x4,15x4,10x4,4 | 21x4 | 5x8 | 22x4,23x4 | 6x8,7x8 | 25x4(target 5) | 8x8 | 25x4 |
| A | 2a) Seated leg curl | Undulating Rep Range | 3 | 1 | 50x5, 40x12,12,12 | 49x6 | 37x12 | 50x6,52 | 38x12 | 53x5 | 40x12,41x12,42x12 | 53x6 |
| A | 2b) Bench press | Undulating Rep Range | 2 | 2 | 125x1, 100x9,8,6 | 114x6 | 90x11 | 115x6 | 92x11 | 117x6 | 95x11 | 119x3 |
| Comments |  |  |  |  | For all exercises in mesocycle 1, unless otherwise specified, find the lowest RM you're comfortable with (should be 1-5), then drop the weight by 20% and perform as many reps as you can with the lighter weight, e.g. 100x2, 80x9,7,6 |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |
| B | 1) Romanian deadlift | Undulating | 4 | 2 | 185x5, 150x12,12,12 | 182x(180)x7 | 147x20 | 182x7 | 150x20, 152x20,154x12 | 187x7(form iffy) | 154x20 | 187x7(better form?) |
| B | 2a) Butterfly lateral raise | Undulating Rep Range | 4 | 5 | 20x2, 15x7,7,6 | 15x7 | 10x15 | 20x2,15x7 | Lat raise machine 45x7 ,47.5(easy) | 15lbs x7 | 11x13 | 60x7(lat raise machine ),62.5x7 |
| B | 2b) Hip abduction | Undulating Rep Range | 3 | 1 | 155x5, 125x16,10,11 | 143x9 | 116x14 | 145x8( rom issue ) | 117x14 | 145x8 | 118x14,120x14,122x14 | 145x9 |
| B | 3a) Bayesian curls | Undulating Rep Range | 3 | 1 | 17.5x3, 12.5 x10,11, | 16x(15) x13 | 13x14 | 16x6(target 7) | 14x14 | 17.5x6(barely..form issue maybe ) | 13.5x13(correct form ) | 17.5x4 |
| B | 3b) Skull-overs | Undulating Rep Range | 3 | 2 | 60x1,45 x9,9 | 50x10 | 40x14 | 52x10 | 42x14( assume ez is 30),44x12 | 54x10 | 44x14 | 55x9 |
| Comments |  |  |  |  | For all exercises in mesocycle 1, unless otherwise specified, find the lowest RM you're comfortable with (should be 1-5), then drop the weight by 20% and perform as many reps as you can with the lighter weight, e.g. 100x2, 80x9,7,6 |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |
| C | 1a) Pull-throughs | <= 8/15 Undulating Rep Range | 4 | 5 | 55x5,45x22,20,x22 | 120lbsx8, | 100x15( full range of motion?) | Back extension uni, 15x8 | 102.5x15,110x15(back extention 25lbs) | 130x8,140x8,40lbs extention | 120lbsx15 back extention 30lbs | 150x8 |
| C | 1b) 45° Incline bench press | Undulating Rep Range | 3 | 2 | 85x5,70x10,10 | 82x7 | 67x11 | 85x7 | 69x11 | 87x7 | 70x11,72x11,75x11 | 89x7(kb:30x12,40x12) |
| C | 2a) Pull-ups | Undulating Rep Range | 2 | 1 | 15x3,10x4 | 9x5 | 1x8 | 10x5,11x5 | 2x8, | 12x5 | 3.5x8 | 13x5 |
| C | 2b) Unilateral lying leg curls | Undulating rep Range | 3 | 1 | 35x5,25x18,12 | 35x7 | 25x12 | 36x7,37x7,38x | 30x10 | 40x7 | 30x11.5(rom issue ) | 46x5(oops) |
| C | 2c) Overhead triceps extension | Undulating Rep Range | 1 | 1 | Unilateral , 12.5 x3 | 11x7 | 9x13 | 12.5x7 | 10.5x12 | 13.5x7 | 11.5x10 | 14.5x7 |
| Comments |  |  |  |  | For all exercises in mesocycle 1, unless otherwise specified, find the lowest RM you're comfortable with (should be 1-5), then drop the weight by 20% and perform as many reps as you can with the lighter weight, e.g. 100x2, 80x9,7,6 |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |
| D | 1a) Hip thrust | Undulating Rep Range | 4 | 2 | 235x5( with resistance band ),185x12,9, | 230x5(maybe 6 target ) | 190x12 | 232x6,234x6,235x6 | 192x12,194x12 | 237x6,239x6,240x6, | 195x12 | 242x6,245x6, 250x6 |
| D | 1b) Cable lateral raise | Undulating Rep Range | 3 | 1 | 12x5,10x 12,10 | 11x6 | 8.5x13 | 12x6 | 7.5x10 correct form | 10x6 | 7.5x13 | 11x6 |
| D | 2a) Push-ups | Rep Range | 3 | 1; deficit; incline | Bwx23,20,16 | 25x18 | 26x18 | 28x18 | 30x14 | 30x16 | 30x17 | 30x18 |
| D | 2b) Bayesian reverse fly | <= 8/15 Undulating Rep Range | 3 | 1 | 100x5,80x13,15 | 5x8 | 2.5x15 | 5.5x8 | 3.5x15 | 6x8,7.5x7 | 4x15 | 7.5x8 |
| Comments |  |  |  |  | For all exercises in mesocycle 1, unless otherwise specified, find the lowest RM you're comfortable with, then drop the weight by 20% and perform your remaining sets as normal (1 rep to failure). |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |
| [... truncated ...] |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |
